# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  vmNamePrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "devvm"
  adminUsername:
    type: string
  adminPassword:
    type: secureString
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "East US"
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Standard_D2s_v3"
  imageReference:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Windows2019Datacenter"
  numberOfVMs:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2

variables:
  vnetName: "devVnet"
  subnetName: "devSubnet"
  addressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/16"
  subnetPrefix: "10.0.0.0/24"
  publicIPPrefix: "pip-"

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[variables('vnetName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - "[variables('addressPrefix')]"
    subnets:
      - name: "[variables('subnetName')]"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[variables('subnetPrefix')]"

- type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[concat(variables('publicIPPrefix'), copyIndex(1))]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  copy:
    name: pipCopy
    count: "[parameters('numberOfVMs')]"
  properties:
    publicIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
    dnsSettings:
      domainNameLabel: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    
- type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), '-nic')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  copy:
    name: nicCopy
    count: "[parameters('numberOfVMs')]"
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: ipconfig1
        properties:
          privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
          subnet:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
          publicIPAddress:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('publicIPPrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"

- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  copy:
    name: vmCopy
    count: "[parameters('numberOfVMs')]"
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
    osProfile:
      computerName: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]"
      adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
      adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
    storageProfile:
      imageReference:
        publisher: "MicrosoftWindowsServer"
        offer: "WindowsServer"
        sku: "[parameters('imageReference')]"
        version: "latest"
      osDisk:
        createOption: "FromImage"
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), '-nic'))]"
